Hero.title: Dang Phuc Anh
Hero.description: Data Science scholar focused on transforming raw complexity into elegant, scalable digital narratives.
Hero.role: Architecting actionable insights through the strategic exploitation of data. Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (BUT) in Data Science at the University of Lille, seeking a 10-week internship starting April 6, 2026.
Hero.quote: "Without data, you’re just another person with an opinion."

frenchCinema.title: French Cinema Analysis
frenchCinema.description: Analysis of French cinema trends, highlighting resilience findings post-Covid using Python, R, and Power BI.

airQuality.title: Vietnam Air Quality
airQuality.description: Investigation of air quality patterns using APIs and unsupervised clustering (K-means).

dataWarehouse.title: Chinook Data Warehouse
dataWarehouse.description: Automated ETL pipeline using Oracle Data Integrator to transform musical sales data into a star-schema Data Warehouse.

Contact.title: Let's Connect
Contact.text: Interested in collaborating or have a question? I'm always open to discussing data science, AI, and creative development.
